name: @zerocmf/yishan
description: 移山通用管理系统 - 基于 React/Ant Design Pro、Fastify、Docusaurus 的 monorepo 解决方案

scripts.build: pnpm --filter yishan-tiptap build && pnpm --filter yishan-admin build && pnpm --filter yishan-docs build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter yishan-admin lint && pnpm --filter yishan-docs typecheck && pnpm --filter yishan-app lint && node scripts/check-module-naming.mjs && node scripts/check-main-baseline.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm --filter yishan-admin test && pnpm --filter yishan-api test

author: yishan
